title: Mental Health Related EMS and ED Events by County
notes:
This dataset contains the underlying data for the public-facing 'Mental Health Related EMS and ED Events' dashboard.

7/25/2025: We have recently updated the data for more recent years on our public data hub. As a result, you may notice changes in the data for previous years. This change is due to a correction in our data processing methods, which has led to more accurate counts for past years.

resources.name: Mental Health Related EMS and ED Events by County
